sections.core: The only cash core underwrite is Safe Celebration (security). Everything else — dinner, Santa, crafts, Inflatable Carnival Games (owned deploy), print, talent — lives in the gift registry. Without gifts, the evening would be skeletal but safe. Bounce houses are a separate vendor rental if ever added.
sections.registry: Named gifts with slot counts — use the counter on each card to claim shares of that story’s pool (not duplicate full builds). This is the substance of the fete.
sections.tiers: Friend, Community, and Celebration are claimable recognition for sponsors who do not care which gift to fund. Presenting and Title are traditional flagship packages (like 2025 Presenting / Event Sponsor). Funding gifts that reach a threshold also unlocks that level — no need to claim it twice.
sections.options: Presenting ($2,500) and Title ($5,000) restore 2025 package substance — toys, VIP registrations, stage/banner — whether claimed as a package or reached through gifts.
